translations: the Favors of Allah the Favors of Allah
puzzle.hint: This verse speaks of the impossibility of quantifying Allah's countless blessings upon creation.
puzzle.arabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَآ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَغَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
puzzle.verseEn: And if you should count the favors of Allāh, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.
